programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilots resistance to interrogation Hogan brings the mans fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agents help in blackmailing Gen Burkhalter so Klink wont be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower

programme.desc: Mchale 336

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys dig up a brontosaurus leg bone on their property Kate wants to donate the bone to a museum but Grampa would rather cash in on a roadside stand tourist attraction

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor accepts a summer job in Texas which doesnt make Daisy happy; Wood may have found a new quarterback; Herman books John Denver to give the commencement speech

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are nervous as Molly shows interest in boys

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When two vagrants come across an attempted hit and one of them is killed The other calls Dan When Dan goes to the place and asks Nelson to meet him and there are no signs of a hit Dan then sees the vagrant; an old friend Dan believes her and sets out to prove it Later some men tell Dan to back off which he doesnt Dan learns that the government may be involved And the hit men set out to find her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jonathan and Jennifer are in Hawaii for a croquet tournament when a tournament official is stabbed and the Harts wind up in an international dilemma involving the KGB MI-6 the CIA and a fancy key that may unlock deadly secrets

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie receives a blood transfusion after an appendectomy not knowing that it was one of the Darryls who gave her blood

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael is fired after insulting the daughter of WPIVs new owner and the only work he can find is as a shoe salesman

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane resurrects his wife Tatania only to learn the woman hes kept frozen all these years is Kitty Lane an exotic dancer and impostor placed in Arcanes lab by General Sunderland Sunderland has been holding the real Tatania captive

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane uploads the memory of his former teacher directly into his own In an ironic twist of justice Carl Mirador was schizophrenic and is now driving Arcane insane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Ships engineer Patrick Osgood believes he can obtain tiranuim to make a new heart for his sick wife Michelle from the catacombs of the moon using explosives The explosion which follows gives him a vision of the future in which the moon is destroyed by a fireball and a sudden heat storm strikes Though Helena is making a new heart for Michelle its repeated failures cause Osgood to become impatient Convinced he is his wifes only salvation he drags Michelle down into the catacombs giving Koenig a double task - to avoid the fireball and save the Osgoods

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they with Liam have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The exact rendering of a map is duplicated in order to fool a female spy Its the second part of an overlay that details NATOs missile defense system

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jesse Arnett

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Researchers in Africa discover a Golden Scarab which they believe to be part of a hidden treasure that belonged to a lost tribe of Egypt Of course VENOM is after the treasure themselves Sly Rax accidentally triggers an ancient device in an underground lake that creates an opening in the walls of Solomons Gorge and reveals the treasure MASK must stop VENOM from escaping with the treasure
